C

ChoiceDescription<P> - Class in timgutilities.textio
This class represents a single choice that is used for the choice based methods.
ChoiceDescription(String) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance only containing an option.
ChoiceDescription(String, boolean) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance only containing an option.
ChoiceDescription(String, boolean, P) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance containing an option and param.
ChoiceDescription(String, String) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance only containing an option and description.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance only containing an option and description.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, boolean, P) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance containing an option, description and param.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, String) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance only containing an option, description and additional.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance only containing an option, description and additional.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, String, boolean, P) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance containing an option, description, additional and param.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, String, P) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance containing an option, description, additional and associated parameter.
ChoiceDescription(String, String, P) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance containing an option, description and associated parameter.
ChoiceDescription(String, P) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Create an instance containing an option and associated parameter.
ChoiceDescriptionData<P> - Class in timgutilities.textio
This class represents a set of choice inputs for the choice engine.
ChoiceDescriptionData() - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Build an empty version, will need to be populated by adding options separately
ChoiceDescriptionData(String[]) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build from an array with just options text
ChoiceDescriptionData(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build based on array input for the choice text and description
ChoiceDescriptionData(String[], String[], String[]) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Built based on array input for all the descriptions, all arrays must be the same size
ChoiceDescriptionData(Collection<String>) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build from a collection of jst the options text
ChoiceDescriptionData(List<ChoiceDescription<P>>) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build from a list of choice description objects that already exist
choiceDescriptionIsPresent(ChoiceDescription<P>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
check if an option is in the list
choseFromDirectory(String, String, DirectorySelectionMode, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls Entries shown will depend on the selectionMode, so if the selection mode limits choices to directories only directories will be shown, but a mode that allows only files to be chosen will display the directories for navigation purposes, but they cannot be chosen.
choseFromDirectory(String, Path, DirectorySelectionMode, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls.
clone() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Do a shallow clone, with the exception that the list of choice descriptions is a new list, but contains the original choice descriptions
compareTo(ChoiceDescription<?>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
 
compareTo(DirectoryEntry) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
compares to another Directory entry by comparing the names
completeAndLock() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Triggers the process of handling sort, adding abandons etc, and makes the list read only.
currentDirectoryName - Static variable in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
String to be used as the name for the entry for the current directory
